meta.title: Les Espanters | World Music Duo Montpellier. Oud, Guitar & Lapsteel | Concerts Hérault
meta.description: Les Espanters, wild world music duo from Montpellier! Oud, electric guitar and lapsteel for concerts, festivals, weddings and private events in Hérault and Occitanie. Hold on tight.
meta.keywords: concert Montpellier, world music duo Hérault, live band Occitanie, event musician Montpellier, world music Montpellier, oud Montpellier, lapsteel Montpellier, oriental music Hérault, private concert Montpellier, wedding live music Hérault, festival Montpellier, Mediterranean band, instrumental music event, instrumental duo wedding Occitanie
meta.ogTitle: Les Espanters | World Music Duo Montpellier
meta.ogDescription: Unhinged world music duo from Montpellier. Oud, electric guitar, lapsteel. Concerts, festivals and private events in Hérault and Occitanie. Things will get loud.

music.title: OUR MUSIC
music.description: Oud getting rowdy with electric guitar, lapsteel going off the rails on desert rhythms! A sonic trip from dunes to mountains, composed in Montpellier. Chill background at dinner or full-blown chaos on stage!
music.imageAlt: World music duo live Montpellier oud guitar lapsteel concert

booking.title: FOR WHOM?
booking.description: Festival, private gig, bohemian wedding, corporate party, restaurant or drinks with mates. We bring the oud, the lapsteel and all the world-arabesque-western-folk-blues madness. You bring the ears!
booking.imageAlt: Private concert Montpellier wedding corporate event live band

story.title: BASED IN MONTPELLIER
story.locationText: Musical duo based in Montpellier, Hérault. We play across Occitanie: Montpellier, Nîmes, Béziers, Sète, Toulouse, Perpignan and beyond if the adventure calls.
story.storyText: Two neighbors, some beers, a lot of laughs, and one day someone plugged in an amp. Result: an oud chatting up a lapsteel, rhythms that have no business working together but somehow do. On stage we have a blast and you can hear it! 💛
